name: Logan
text: Door's a door. I'll handle it.

name: Father Michael
text: Eight souls. No windows. The Lord places us where He wills.

name: Min-ho
text: Has everyone eaten? There's no telling how long we'll be here.

name: Eleanor
text: We will not panic. That much is decided.

name: Victoria
text: Decided by whom, exactly.

name: Chloe
text: No clock in the room. Worth noting.

name: Luna
text: Um. Hi. Sorry. I don't — I don't know any of you?

name: Logan
text: Logan. That's all you need.

name: Eleanor
text: Eleanor. You may sit if you wish.

name: Father Michael
text: Father Michael. Forty years in the parish. I know fear when I hear it.

name: Victoria
text: Victoria. And I don't sit on command, Eleanor.

name: Min-ho
text: I'm Min-ho. It's okay, we'll figure this out together.

name: Chloe
text: Chloe.

name: Luna
text: Luna. Sorry. Hi. This is so weird, haha.

name: Father Michael
text: Nervous laughter often hides a heavier heart, child.

name: Luna
text: Oh. I — I just laugh when I'm nervous. That's all.

name: Logan
text: Leave the kid alone, Father.

name: Victoria
text: She can speak for herself. Can't you, Luna.

name: Min-ho
text: It's alright, sir. We'll keep an eye out for you. You're not alone in this.

name: Eleanor
text: Min-ho. Come stand near me. You have a steady manner.

name: Min-ho
text: Oh — I'm fine where I am, but thank you.

name: Logan
text: She's already picking favorites. Cute.

name: Eleanor
text: I am establishing order. You may benefit from it eventually.

name: Chloe
text: The air vent is circulating. Whoever put us here wants us alive.

name: Luna
text: Wait. Wants us alive? That's — that's a really scary way to phrase that.

name: Chloe
text: It's accurate.

name: Victoria
text: Luna. Sweetheart. Breathe. Who were you with before this.

name: Luna
text: I — nobody. I was at home. I was on my phone.

name: Victoria
text: On your phone. Talking to someone special.

name: Luna
text: That's — that's none of your business, actually.

name: Father Michael
text: Good. Modesty becomes you.

name: Logan
text: Christ, Father.

name: Father Michael
text: Mind your tongue.

name: Min-ho
text: Are you two okay? Do you need to sit down for a minute?

name: Eleanor
text: She is not fine. But she will not be told so.

name: Logan
text: Anyone tries the door yet, or are we still doing introductions.

name: Chloe
text: It's locked. I tried while you were talking.

name: Logan
text: Huh. Alright. You're useful.

name: Victoria
text: Luna, come sit by me. The men are getting loud.

name: Luna
text: I'm okay over here. Thanks though.

name: Eleanor
text: Wise girl.

name: Victoria
text: Careful, Eleanor. You're showing your hand.

name: Father Michael
text: Pride sits at this table heavy tonight.

name: Min-ho
text: Maybe we could just — go around and say one thing we noticed about the room? Something useful?

name: Logan
text: Kid's got the only good idea so far.

name: Chloe
text: It's shaped like Ireland.

name: Father Michael
text: ...The Lord has a sense of humor after all.
